title: Accounts Payable Specialist
description: CBRE is the world's largest real estate services firm, managing trillions in commercial property. You'll be part of a global team managing complex transactions and operations.
responsibilities: Process vendor invoices and match to purchase orders
Maintain vendor master files and payment terms
Reconcile AP subledger accounts and resolve discrepancies
Handle vendor inquiries and resolve payment issues
Support audit activities and regulatory compliance

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; some accounting coursework preferred
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years of accounts payable or accounting experience

benefits: Paid vacation, holidays, and personal days
